title: murdannia semiteres
intro: Murdannia semiteres, also known as the yellow zinnia or mudan ya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Murdannia semiteres include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even help manage diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, and its roots are used in traditional medicine in the form of decoctions and infusions.
